purpose: Activity Log entry — Ilene Specialty Pharmacy briefing 2026-05-13: podcast education path, first stops Thu 5/14

text.content: Ilene — Specialty Pharmacy program briefing + GI rollout sequencing

Briefed Ilene on Specialty Pharmacy program (en route to Tim ENG visit). Next education step: have her listen to the SP podcast. Rollout sequencing: first provider stops start Thu 5/14 — Dr Kiranpreet visit 09:30 already pinned (Staten Island). Ilene-direct GI half of 21d carry continues to close; Article 28 ABBA half remains outstanding.

Confirm Ilene listened to podcast before Thu visits. Execute Kiranpreet 09:30 visit Thu 5/14. Begin 340b referral flow with Dr Inna Gordin (via Dr G). Followup w/ Dr Yili Huang dinner target Mon 5/19.
